title: Create SendAddressResolver utility
description: Create VultisigApp/VultisigApp/Services/SendAddressResolver.swift - a struct with static resolveAlias() that centralizes vault name, address book, and ENS label resolution. Replaces duplicated lookup logic in SendVerifyScreen, SendCryptoDoneView, and JoinKeysignDoneSummary. Uses lowercased comparison consistently. Add to project.pbxproj via /add-xcode-files.

title: E2E simulator test: send alias display
description: Use agent-device-mobile to test on simulator: send to own vault (verify vault name label), send to address book entry (verify contact name), send to raw address (no label). Record video of all flows. Do NOT push.
close_reason: Verified on simulator: vault name shows correctly on verify screen. Video at /tmp/vultisig_send_alias_test.mov

title: Update consuming views to use resolver and toAlias
description: Update SendVerifyScreen, SendCryptoDoneView, JoinKeysignDoneSummary, SendCryptoVerifySummaryView, SendCryptoSecondaryDoneView to use SendAddressResolver.resolveAlias() and pass single toAlias. Add @Query vaults to JoinKeysignDoneSummary (fixes missing vault labels). Fix NSLocalizedString -> .localized in SendCryptoVerifySummaryView. Addresses H2/H5/C2/C3/C5.
close_reason: Updated all consuming views to use SendAddressResolver and toAlias

title: Simplify data structs: 3 fields to toAlias
description: Replace toVaultName/toAddressBookTitle/toAddressLabel with single toAlias: String? in both SendCryptoVerifySummary.swift and SendCryptoContent (SendCryptoDoneContent.swift). Update inits accordingly. Addresses gastonm5 comments H3/H4.
close_reason: Simplified SendCryptoVerifySummary and SendCryptoContent to use single toAlias

title: Move lastResolvedAddress to SendCryptoViewModel
description: Remove lastResolvedAddress from SendTransaction.swift (line 13), move to SendCryptoViewModel as private var. Update validateToAddress() refs. Clear toAddressLabel in parseCryptoURI() to prevent stale labels. Addresses gastonm5 H1 and CodeRabbit C1.
close_reason: Moved lastResolvedAddress to SendCryptoViewModel, cleared toAddressLabel in parseCryptoURI
